ValidationRule.description: MIS-6306 MIS-4011 Duplicate VR for Upsell Opps only. In Upsell the User can choose any of the "Product Tracking" fields (including Other/App Intel) in order to move on from 25%.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISCHANGED(StageName), ISNEW() ), Probability >= 0.25, not(ISPICKVAL(Product_Sold__c, 'Annual Price Increase')), RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Partnership', ISPICKVAL(Type, 'Upsell'), !(Count_Tracking_Products__c >0 ), $Profile.Name != "Integration User No DF", $Profile.Name != "SW SalesOps Extended", $Profile.Name != "SW SalesOps", $Profile.Name != "System Administrator1", RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Wolves", RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Rank_Ranger" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please fill in all applicable Products. Click no the 'Product Tracking' button on the top left and select at least 1 Base Product (for New Sale and Renewal).
